summary: Continued SysDolphin baselib TObj decompilation by matching TObjUpdateFunc, completing C implementations for HSD_TObjAnim, HSD_TObjAnimAll, TObjLoad, and HSD_TObjLoadDesc, and replacing large portions of asm/sysdolphin/baselib/tobj.s with C. The PR also promoted TObj-related labels to real symbols, added GXTexMtx enum definitions, adjusted TObj struct/class info fields, and renamed call sites from func_8035EB6C to HSD_TObjAnim across several Melee asm files.
what_changed: Removed the NON_MATCHING guard around TObjUpdateFunc and made it matching in C, replacing a large assembly implementation in asm/sysdolphin/baselib/tobj.s.
Added HSD_TObjAnim in C as a null-safe wrapper around HSD_AObjInterpretAnim(tobj->aobj, tobj, TObjUpdateFunc).
Added HSD_TObjAnimAll in C to iterate the linked TObj list and call HSD_TObjAnim on each node.

Added TObjLoad in C to populate an HSD_TObj from HSD_TObjDesc, including next-chain loading, texture source/id fields, default GX_IDENTITY matrix id, transform fields, wrap/repeat settings, blend flags, tlut loading, TEX_MTX_DIRTY, tlut_no set to (u8)-1, and TEV loading.

Added HSD_TObjLoadDesc in C to return NULL for a NULL descriptor, allocate via allocShadowTObj when class_name is missing or unknown, otherwise allocate via hsdNew(info), assert on allocation failure, and dispatch through HSD_TOBJ_METHOD(tobj)->load.
Defined HSD_TObjInfo hsdTObj = { TObjInfoInit } in tobj.c, and converted lbl_804D5C90/lbl_804D5C98 from assembly-side sdata labels into C string definitions for "tobj.c" and "tobj".
Added GXTexMtx enum to include/dolphin/gx/gxtypes.h with GX_TEXMTX0 through GX_TEXMTX9 and GX_IDENTITY = 60.
Changed HSD_TObj.mtxid from u32 to GXTexMtx and removed the anim_id field from HSD_TObj.
Removed the update callback field from HSD_TObjInfo, implying TObjUpdateFunc is used directly by HSD_TObjAnim rather than stored as a class method.
Updated declarations in tobj.h for TObjLoad, HSD_TObjLoadDesc, and HSD_TlutLoadDesc ordering.
Renamed func_8035EB6C to HSD_TObjAnim in include/functions.h and at existing asm call sites in ftanim.s, code_801601C4.s, ifstatus.s, and mngallery.s.
Renamed lbl_80405570 to hsdTObj in include/variables.h.
smart_moves: Kept the animation update callback static in tobj.c and passed it directly to HSD_AObjInterpretAnim, which avoided exposing an unnecessary class-info update method and helped remove the HSD_TObjInfo update slot.
Used named GXTexMtx values instead of raw u32 for mtxid, making the default GX_IDENTITY assignment and texture matrix semantics clearer.
Cleaned up data/sdata by defining hsdTObj and TObj string literals in C rather than relying on external assembly labels, reducing extern clutter.
Propagated the resolved HSD_TObjAnim name to all known assembly call sites, improving cross-system searchability while preserving the existing asm code.
Replaced an assert string label for tobj->imagetbl with the literal "tobj->imagetbl", reducing dependence on an extern label while preserving assert evidence.
decomp_lessons: For jump-table-heavy callbacks, matching the callback in C can unlock removal of a large assembly block once case ordering and constants are modeled correctly.
When a formerly unknown function is identified, update both central declarations and all existing asm call annotations so later decomp work inherits the semantic name.
Class-info objects and assert strings can often be moved from asm data/sdata into C once their types and initializers are understood.
Header struct cleanup can be part of matching work: removing fields such as anim_id or update from structs/class-info should be evidence-driven by matching offsets and method usage.
Adding SDK-style enums such as GXTexMtx can clarify magic constants and improve type accuracy without changing generated behavior.
naming_conventions: func_8035EE14 was renamed in declarations to HSD_TObjTevLoadDesc.
The default TObj class/info object uses the HSD-style name hsdTObj.
Texture object API names follow the HSD_TObj* pattern: HSD_TObjAnim, HSD_TObjAnimAll, HSD_TObjLoadDesc.
Internal loader naming uses TObjLoad, matching class method style rather than the exported HSD_ prefix.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Converted TObjUpdateFunc from a NON_MATCHING C stub plus asm fallback into matching C, eliminating hundreds of lines from asm/sysdolphin/baselib/tobj.s.
Used a direct HSD_AObjInterpretAnim call with TObjUpdateFunc to match HSD_TObjAnim.
Preserved asm call sites but changed their symbolic branch target from func_8035EB6C to HSD_TObjAnim, a low-risk way to improve naming before decompiling those caller files.
Moved sdata strings and the hsdTObj class-info initializer into C to reduce label extern dependencies and match data placement.
Introduced GXTexMtx enum constants so assignments like GX_IDENTITY can produce clearer source while retaining the same underlying values.
review_feedback: No issue comments, review comments, or reviews were present in the provided PR slice.
follow_up_queries: Look for later PRs touching HSD_TObjInfo to confirm removal of the update callback remains consistent across class initialization.
Search for remaining func_8035EE14 references and confirm all are renamed to HSD_TObjTevLoadDesc.
Search for remaining raw texture matrix constants that could use GXTexMtx names.
Inspect later TObj PRs for completion of HSD_TObjTevLoadDesc, HSD_TObjRemoveAll, and related tlut/image descriptor routines.
Check whether any remaining asm references still use lbl_804055B8 or other TObj assert-string labels that can be moved into C.
